description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a prominent front porch and a large, dark blue gable roof. The facade features a covered balcony above the main entrance, supported by wooden posts and railings, and a single-car garage with a white door. The exterior walls are clad in a warm brown material, likely wood or siding, with horizontal bands accentuating each floor. Large rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged on both the front and rear elevations, providing ample natural light. The house sits on a concrete foundation with a driveway leading up to the garage, and the overall design is simple yet functional, suitable for suburban or urban neighborhoods.
description: A two-story brown house with a dark blue gable roof, front porch, balcony, and single-car garage. Symmetrical windows and wood accents give it a classic suburban look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, balcony, garage door, and symmetrical windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the overhanging roof, and the absence of windows on this side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying three rows of large windows and the simple, flat back facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the extended porch and balcony, with no windows on this side.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered front porch with balcony above, wooden posts, and a single main door adjacent to a garage door.
